_note: Single source of truth for system-wide categorization. Every generator (KSI signal, OSCAL SSP, OSCAL POA&M, VDR, dashboard) reads impact_level from here and emits the identical canonical string. The reconciliation gate (scripts/reconcile.py, invariant d) fails closed if the four artifacts ever disagree. Changing the system's impact level is a one-line edit here, not a hunt across generators.

fips_199.rationale: Integrity is Moderate (public-facing content; defacement/tamper impact). Confidentiality and Availability are Low (no federal data, single operator, static site). High-water mark is therefore Moderate. This is the authoritative categorization; no component or artifact may assert the system is FIPS-199 Low.
